$wr12_comment: WR-12: list every transitively-required file explicitly. TypeScript will compile transitively-imported files even when they are not in `include`, but the include list is the only self-documenting place that says 'these files are part of the CJS build'. Adding src/errors.ts here makes the dependency visible to the next reader and ensures dist-cjs/errors.js does not silently disappear if the import seam moves.
$phase6_comment: Phase 6 plan 06-02: src/vcs/format-migration/** is ESM-ONLY by design. The rewriter library's orchestrator (run.ts) imports from src/query/* (atomicWriteConfig, acquireStateLock, planningPaths, sanitizeCommitMessage) which transitively pulls model-catalog.ts + sdk-package-compatibility.ts — both use `import.meta.url` (TS1343 on module='commonjs'). The CJS consumer surface for the rewriter is empty: bin/lib/*.cjs does NOT call format-migration directly; only the ESM SDK verb handler in plan 06-03 (src/query/migrate-vcs.ts) does. Excluding the whole directory keeps the CJS build hermetic.
